name: Messie Messenger
postCreateCommand: sudo mkdir -p /go/pkg/mod /root/.cache/go-build && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /go/pkg/mod /root/.cache/go-build && cd backend && go mod download && cd ../frontend && npm install
postStartCommand: mkdir -p ~/.ssh && touch ~/.ssh/known_hosts && (ssh-keygen -F github.com >/dev/null || ssh-keyscan -H github.com >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null || true)
